name: chain_day_200_just_hit_12k_in_revenue_it_st
method: Day 200. Just hit $12k in revenue. It still feels unreal. About 7 months ago I launched [my tool](https://www.tydal.co/). Its a tool that monitors Reddit for people looking for something you offer and

stages.task: Pull latest posts from LEDGER/RESEARCH_SUBREDDITS.csv subreddits using background_reddit_scraper.py output. Filter for intent keywords: 'looking for', 'need a tool', 'recommend', 'how do I', 'anyone use', 'is there an app'. Score by upvotes + recency.
For each signal, match against our live app portfolio (focuslock, soberstreak, prayerlock, invoiceforge, pdfmaxx, promptvault). Score match 0-10. Only pass score >= 7.

Generate a natural, non-spammy Reddit reply for each qualified signal. Reply adds value first (answers the question), mentions our tool organically in 1-2 sentences. No affiliate links. No hard sell. Matches subreddit tone.
